name: Uncontrolled Search Path Element
description: The product uses a fixed search path to find resources, but one or more locations in that path can be under the control of unintended actors, such as writable directories like /tmp or the current working directory.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM node loads executable or library via search path that includes STORAGE locations writable by untrusted actors, without CONTROL node verifying resource integrity or restricting search order
